title: Okay, this unleashed my agent
summary: AI Jason reviews free and commercial agent systems including Autoresearch, AutoAgent, and Claude Code. The video demonstrates a 3-layer memory system, self-evolving mechanisms in Hermes, and skill comparison in Openclaw. The creator expresses enthusiasm about the capabilities these agent approaches unlock.
